calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Janet Brayer, Esq. (415)281-8888, for plaintiffs Personality Hotels,Inc. and Frank Lembi
Tina Bantay, agent for Personality Hotels, Inc.
Tina Bantay is sworn and examined. After hearing the declatory evidence the court grants the the judgment in favor of the plaintiffs, and against the defendants, Debra Maloney and Duncan Goedde as follows: Principal:$108,370.21; Attorneys Fees: $1,225.00; Costs: $438.00 for a total judgment of $110,033.21. The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a judgment for signature.
Commissioner: Loretta Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter: June Leathey, CSR # 1629
